response.justification: Although the candidate is a highly experienced software engineer with a robust background in full-stack development and modern software practices, they do not meet the core mandatory requirements for this role. Specifically, they lack the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform, possessing only 7 months of professional C/C++ experience from 2015, and they lack the necessary Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain expertise.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) across various stacks including TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and Java.
Strong demonstrated knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, TDD, and DevOps infrastructure, which aligns with the optional skills.
Some exposure to the investment/wealth tech sector through their previous role at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, with only a brief 7-month stint in 2014-2015.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform C++ development, SQL Server, or Oracle databases.
Missing required deep domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income derivatives.
